data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. LAKEVIEW CINDY was out of the frame on debut then improved with an effortless maiden success as she ran right away to score at Warragul (26.01). Has good ability and looks hard to top again. 8. DR. ZAIDEN could manage only fourth at this track last time but turned heads when posting an excellent 22.59 over 400m at Warragul the start prior. Top win two back and can measure up again. 1. TUCKER'S BOY finds it hard to break through. Has finished in the placings two on end now, the latest when second (24.86) at this track. Has performed well from this box with a win and two minor placings to his name from four starts. Ready to find winning form. 6. CALLISTA is in the mix despite missing out at this track last time.","runners":[4,1,6],"exclusive":false}
